roa.docketEntryComment: ADA'S ADD TO CALENDAR MOTION RE RESTITUTION STATUS FILED

/CAL:RESTITUTION STATUS/X:BOTH PARTIES STIPULATE THAT DEFENDANT'S INSURANCE HAS PAID ALL RESTITUTION OWED IN THIS MATTER/CTORD:GENERAL ORDER FOR VICTIM RESTITUTION AS TO THE 3 VICTIMS SHIRLEY DANG, PAULA VALENCIA & BRIAN KOHN/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL CONTINUE ON PROBATION/

/TWS/CH2:ISS:CPROB:PROB 3 Y:PJ 25 D/CTS:2/SWAPD:10-31-18/X:DEFENDANT MAY COMPLETE COUNTY JAIL IN ALAMEDA COUNTY/PF390 18/VF2:150/FOP1: 3 MONTH/X:DEFENDANT MAY COMPLETE ALCOHOL PROGRAM IN ALAMEDA COUNTY/LVAL/LCHEM/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CITE/EMAT/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:COURT REFERS DEFENDANT TO PROBATION DEPT FOR RESTITUTION/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 100 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/4019HALF/CONTD:RESTITUTION REPORT FROM APD ON 12-10-18/
/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/JAVS/X:THE DEFENSE PROVIDES PROOF OF PROGRAM TODAY/CONT/X:THE DEFENDANT'S APPEARANCE IS WAIVED UNLESS DISPO & PROOF OF PROGRAM/
/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DAWT/X:THE DEFENSE PROVIDED PROOF OF PROGRAM TOTHE PEOPLE/CONT/X:THE DEFENDANT'S APPEARANCE IS WAIVED WITH PROOF OF PROGRAM/
/CAL:PRETRIAL/NP/CTORD:DEFENDANT NO LONGER REQUIRED TO CHECK IN WITH PRETRIAL SERVICES, SHE IS IN A PROGRAM AT KAISER/CONTD:PRETRIAL/X:DAW WITH PROOF OF PROGRAM/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:THE PEOPLE FILED FIRST AMENDED MISDEMEANOR COMPLAINT/AMENDCOM:COUNT 001, 23153(A) VC A MISD; COUNT 002, 23153(B) VC A MISD/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/MVARS/GTWM/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DAWF/
/CAL:DISPO/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFTADV NL:1/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
